name: clearvo
description: Submit e-invoices, calculate global tax (VAT/GST/sales tax), and validate tax numbers via the Clearvo API

api_key.title: Clearvo API Key
api_key.description: From app.clearvo.io/settings — starts with csk_live_ or csk_test_

entity_id.title: Entity ID (optional)
entity_id.description: Only needed with an account-scoped API key operating across multiple entities. Leave blank for entity-scoped keys, or run list_entities to find it.

base_url.title: API Base URL (optional)
base_url.description: The public API is not white-labeled yet — every account, including Taxually-branded ones, uses the default. Leave this as-is unless support tells you otherwise.
